message:
feat(command-transport): enrich CommandPolicyTrace with full decision context

Extend CommandPolicyTrace to carry the complete policy decision context
through the command routing pipeline:

- Add actor (ActorKind), action (ActionKind), pane_id, domain, and
  workflow_id fields to CommandPolicyTrace, all optional with serde
  skip_serializing_if for backwards-compatible wire format
- Extract these fields from DecisionContext in from_surface_and_decision()
  by binding context once instead of calling decision.context() repeatedly
- Expand tracing spans in CommandRouter::route() to emit the new fields
  (policy_actor, policy_action, policy_determining_rule, policy_pane_id,
  policy_domain, policy_workflow_id) for observability
- Update existing tests to assert the new fields and add a new test case
  that constructs a full DecisionContext with workflow_id, domain, and
  pane_id to verify end-to-end audit log preservation

This enables downstream audit consumers (dashboards, compliance tools)
to answer "who did what, where, under which workflow?" from a single
trace record without joining against separate policy evaluation logs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
